pageName: TiDB Integrations: Kubernetes, Kafka, Spark and More

meta.title: TiDB Integrations: Kubernetes, Kafka, Spark and More
meta.description: Explore TiDB and TiDB Cloud integrations -- Kubernetes Operator, Kafka CDC, Spark (TiSpark), Terraform, and more. Deploy faster with TiDB.

props.headline: TiDB Integrations: Kubernetes, Kafka, Spark and Cloud
props.subheadline: TiDB and TiDB Cloud integrate with the tools modern engineering teams already run. Fully MySQL protocol compatible with standard drivers, JDBC, ODBC, and popular ORMs like Hibernate, Prisma, and SQLAlchemy.

props.title: TiDB Integration Categories (At-a-Glance)
props.subtitle: TiDB compatibility spans the modern data and application ecosystem.

items.title: Kubernetes and Cloud-Native
items.description: TiDB Operator, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, New Relic

items.title: Streaming and CDC
items.description: Apache Kafka, TiCDC, Confluent, Apache Flink, Airbyte, dbt

items.title: Analytics and HTAP
items.description: Apache Spark (TiSpark), Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Superset

items.title: AI and MCP Integrations
items.description: LLM integrations, Model Context Protocol, AI-powered analytics

items.title: App Platforms and Serverless
items.description: AWS Lambda, Google Cloud Functions, Vercel, Railway

items.title: Infrastructure Automation
items.description: Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation, Infrastructure as Code

items.title: Connectors, Drivers and ORMs
items.description: JDBC, ODBC, Go, Python, Node.js, Hibernate, SQLAlchemy, Prisma

items.title: Cloud Providers and Marketplaces
items.description: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Alibaba Cloud, Huawei Cloud

props.title: Kubernetes and Cloud-Native Integrations for TiDB
props.subtitle: Run, scale, and monitor TiDB in production using cloud-native orchestration and observability tooling.

items.title: Kubernetes (TiDB Operator)
items.description: Deploy and manage TiDB clusters natively on Kubernetes with automated scaling, upgrades, backup, and self-healing.

items.title: Prometheus
items.description: Collect real-time performance metrics from TiDB clusters for monitoring, alerting, and operational visibility.

items.title: Grafana
items.description: Visualize TiDB performance metrics with prebuilt dashboards for cluster health, query latency, and storage insights.

items.title: Datadog
items.description: Export TiDB metrics into Datadog for centralized monitoring across cloud-native infrastructure.

items.title: New Relic
items.description: Integrate TiDB observability data into New Relic APM workflows for full-stack monitoring.

props.title: TiDB is Fully MySQL Compatible
props.subtitle: TiDB works with standard MySQL drivers, connectors, and tools. Most integrations rely on open standards like JDBC and ODBC — reducing friction when migrating or modernizing existing workloads. If you are modernizing legacy systems, see how to Modernize MySQL workloads with TiDB.

props.title: Streaming and CDC Integrations for TiDB
props.subtitle: Real-time architectures depend on reliable change data capture and event streaming. TiDB supports CDC via TiCDC.

items.title: Apache Kafka (TiCDC)
items.description: Stream real-time changes from TiDB to Kafka using TiCDC for event-driven architectures and data pipelines.

items.title: Apache Flink
items.description: Consume TiDB change streams in Flink for stateful stream processing and real-time analytics.

items.title: Confluent
items.description: Deliver TiDB change events into Confluent-compatible Kafka deployments for scalable streaming workflows.

items.title: Airbyte
items.description: Use Airbyte connectors to move data into or out of TiDB for modern ELT pipelines.

items.title: Amazon AppFlow
items.description: Integrate SaaS data into TiDB via AWS AppFlow for cloud-native data movement workflows.

items.title: dbt
items.description: Transform TiDB data using dbt in ELT pipelines for analytics engineering and modeling.

props.title: Analytics and HTAP Workloads
props.subtitle: TiDB is an HTAP database — handle transactional and analytical workloads on the same data without ETL duplication.

items.title: Apache Spark (TiSpark)
items.description: Run distributed Spark SQL queries directly on TiDB using TiSpark for large-scale analytics without ETL duplication.

items.title: Tableau
items.description: Connect Tableau dashboards to TiDB for interactive visual analytics and business intelligence.

items.title: PowerBI
items.description: Integrate TiDB with Microsoft Power BI for unified data visualization and reporting.

items.title: Looker
items.description: Build self-service analytics with Looker's semantic layer connected to TiDB data.

items.title: Apache Superset
items.description: Create interactive, real-time dashboards with Superset using TiDB as a native data source.

props.title: Drivers, Connectors and ORM Compatibility
props.subtitle: TiDB is MySQL protocol compatible — all standard drivers work without modification.

items.title: JDBC and ODBC
items.description: Standard Java and system-level database connectivity with full ACID and transactional support.

items.title: Python (SQLAlchemy, PyMySQL)
items.description: Connect Python applications using SQLAlchemy ORM and PyMySQL driver with native MySQL compatibility.

items.title: Node.js (Prisma, Sequelize)
items.description: Use Prisma and Sequelize ORMs for Node.js with TiDB as a drop-in MySQL replacement.

items.title: Go (gorm, database/sql)
items.description: Build Go applications with gorm and standard database/sql packages connecting to TiDB.

items.title: Hibernate (Java)
items.description: Use Hibernate with TiDB for object-relational mapping in Java enterprise applications.

props.title: Cloud Providers and Marketplaces
props.subtitle: Deploy TiDB Cloud or self-hosted TiDB across all major cloud providers.

items.title: AWS
items.description: Deploy TiDB Cloud on AWS, access via CloudFormation, and use AWS AppFlow for data integration.

items.title: Google Cloud Platform
items.description: Run TiDB on Google Cloud Bigtable or self-host with native GCP marketplace integrations.

items.title: Microsoft Azure
items.description: Deploy TiDB on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) with Azure Marketplace support.

items.title: Alibaba Cloud
items.description: TiDB deployments on Alibaba Cloud with native marketplace and managed service options.

items.title: Self-Hosted (On-Premises)
items.description: Deploy TiDB on your own infrastructure using Kubernetes Operator or binary installation.

props.title: Ready to Integrate TiDB into Your Tech Stack?
props.subtitle: Explore the full documentation for each integration, or get started with TiDB Cloud free trial today.
